name: Motivational Video Pipeline

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  "max_tokens": 1500,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Create a powerful 60-90 second motivational video script for YouTube. Theme: '{{ $json.theme }}'. Target audience: {{ $json.audience }}.

The script must include:
1. A powerful opening hook (5-10 seconds)
2. An inspiring real-world story or analogy (30-40 seconds)
3. A memorable quote from a famous person
4. A strong call-to-action closing (10-15 seconds)

Respond ONLY with valid JSON (no markdown) containing these fields:
- title: SEO-optimized YouTube title (include year 2026, use power words)
- script: full narration script (spoken words only, 60-90 seconds at normal pace)
- quote: the featured quote with attribution
- description: YouTube description (200 words, includes call to subscribe, 3 relevant links as placeholders)
- tags: array of 12 trending tags
- thumbnail_text: bold text overlay for thumbnail (max 6 words)"
    }
  ]
}

nodes.name: YouTube Upload (Placeholder)
nodes.notes: PLACEHOLDER: Requires YouTube OAuth2 credential and actual video binary. Configure OAuth2 and attach MP4 file before activating.

description:
## Motivational Video Pipeline - Setup Guide

### What this workflow does:
Generates daily motivational video scripts with AI, converts to voiceover using deep 'onyx' voice, uploads to YouTube (@JoyfulFamilyMoments), and notifies via Telegram.

### Credentials to configure in n8n:
1. **Azure Foundry API** (HTTP Header Auth)
   - Header Name: `x-api-key`
   - Header Value: Your AZURE_FOUNDRY_KEY

2. **Azure OpenAI API** (HTTP Header Auth)
   - Header Name: `api-key`
   - Header Value: Your Azure OpenAI key

3. **YouTube OAuth2**
   - Scope: https://www.googleapis.com/auth/youtube.upload
   - Channel: @JoyfulFamilyMoments

4. **Telegram Bot**
   - Token from @BotFather

### Theme Rotation:
- Sunday: Sunday reset planning
- Monday: Overcoming failure
- Tuesday: Morning mindset
- Wednesday: Gratitude mindset
- Thursday: Discipline beats motivation
- Friday: Small steps to big dreams
- Saturday: Weekend warrior

### Schedule: Runs daily at 6:00 AM UTC
